textByHashes.b9e09849626833286b00bb5bb5ff9ca5952e1c1d: You know it's really not that hard. You just need a bit of magic on your side. Anyway, Bob and I go way back.
textByHashes.5da4dc758c58b9b4d82614675c0ae77a5d6e3331: So what was it you wanted?
textByHashes.cbc2a9a452dacd851bc6d1b81435489e3499a976: Well we've never actually done a shared dream between a human and a cat before, but it shouldn't be any different. You'll just need another Potion of Shared Dreaming.
textByHashes.785f192bc0bae8368b384b65cc48027a89d80b87: Would you like me to remind you how they are made?
textByHashes.a9948bed14ada4a0c06481627b4721ffb5908556: I'll give you a vial. You'll need to fill it with water, followed by one ground astral rune and some goutweed.
textByHashes.cca82b307b9c8e61f5d97b0db039bac507ba4e5d: Once you've done that, light the brazier in the middle of town. When you're ready to begin your dream, just use the potion on the brazier.
textByHashes.cb925a4b872a91331445e43b545c6668995d2eac: You'll need to make some room in your inventory for this vial. Come back to me when you have.
textByHashes.606cb08d6b9a173396afd6720ee8e1674661b06c: Here's a vial for your potion. Good luck.
textByHashes.31cb7785e50dd1e8d297746c46ae91a34ccbba54: Hello there. What do you want to talk about?
textByHashes.dcbc96a85459b74407c911d53653c534041c106b: Take the vial I gave you and fill it with water. After that, add one ground astral rune and some goutweed.
textByHashes.3769aaaca8f001a66254056c803ac947e1e76168: In that case you should take it to the brazier in the middle of town.
textByHashes.87d153cc7c8e76082a37fab79916c9855b70a700: Careful, Brundt, I am not the enemy here.
textByHashes.5f249ac6fe2f1bcc7174af9d3f763a58daaacd9b: Oh hello ! It has been a while.
textByHashes.f905e883a53b9017079182a26390e67da577e92c: What brings you here again? Creating more astral runes?
textByHashes.d9bdde332531f62ea3161dbb6386838584fd5acf: Oh yes, I know him. A bright man. What is it about him, my dear?
textByHashes.db4ac83f9834a4e220ba854b187f5e57a28ec0fc: Cyrisus. It's been a while. Your kind friend here was just talking about you.
textByHashes.a2b9d98fb784547bcae00b6081d7d07260c295a7: Of course. With the Potion of Shared Dreaming. It'll send you both into the Dreamland, and sort out your biggest issue.
textByHashes.acf79da1e62edc5f32a357413ad6f4642d289d62: In most ways, yes. However, it will be dangerous.
textByHashes.17368213b7e313fffb770edc0e95c91b149655b2: To get you into the dream together, the potion works by binding your subconsciousnesses together. The brazier has its own intelligence in interpreting your subconscious so it will understand your intentions when
textByHashes.23f06a169fa1841b5f3451c1d7046b55f7eadcf1: With your minds melded as one, you need each other to survive. If one of you dies, you both die for real. Unlike before, you will die just as if you were killed by a monster in the wild.
textByHashes.dbfb45e247a765d16fcb75b9f8f85160da34e4d7: Simple. I shall give you a vial, within which you should place water followed by one ground astral rune and goutweed. Then just use it on the brazier. Oh! You'll have to light it first, of course.
textByHashes.3783a42cd083c6a45e9ac38722ab1ca6e58496c6: Oh no, no need. They were simply ceremonial clothes, you can wear whatever you want.
textByHashes.1061d24cf31a8f9e6f3fa077dc68afc68908f73f: Water, an astral rune and goutweed.
textByHashes.197c0240386890c9801bc9928551ec77ae402e05: Now that wasn't difficult, was it?
textByHashes.e42426cca76ae049e8fd233a666bb29540442b6b: Perhaps Cyrisus can help you out there, he's a resourceful chap.
textByHashes.4d856ae58f3cebfa1816f7b556c5aa1358d4107b: Why hello, how are you today?
textByHashes.44efc668ae74a5f6057217b17848346e0895d66b: By reading your mind. But that's not important. We have some important things to discuss.
textByHashes.6dd6727405a2355c552450ad7f39d41a36a97d3e: Of course! I can see that you come bearing great promise.
textByHashes.b7fc54f9eff9154b2af5f5ebdfce4f4eb94923ce: Please. Just tell me why you have come to our island.
textByHashes.a385daf6667f7bf585fb35bc64a5f5270d1ff360: A very honourable objective, but how do you suppose this will be possible?
textByHashes.951f045255032d509936145387e92464e90a5ef6: We are very in tune with magic as you have no doubt observed, but we have yet to meet one Fremennik with the perspective that this is of any value. They are always picking at us to reveal our secrets, but why
textByHashes.4edaa4b066341e3b78d288e3f131f34bf5610ad0: should we when they view us so.
textByHashes.1429211dd5cf415ae11923fd8908ee291eaed95b: Hmmm. Well you are one of them. Perhaps if you can understand our ways, that will at least be a start. How does that sound to you?
textByHashes.8eb10e334b5f459f0f74251feeb36438f791e785: Well, we have a ritual called 'The View of Self Dream'. It is a ritual that we all have to go through. You see the path to understanding magic is through understanding ourselves. It is a power innate to every
textByHashes.2fb0577bae801bb2215e063f2909a036e1ea3b66: living creature, but it takes a great understanding of self to tap into. One of the best ways to understand ourselves is through our dreams. These are a demonstration of our subconscious, our subconscious
textByHashes.dc268191b5a786f29436aaf81e702ccee63e4fca: being raw and true. But it takes many years to get into a situation where you are ready to attempt it.
textByHashes.3b74271d2b20a8fd83e7537cc6b28fbaf73a16f2: I don't mind you trying, but I really doubt you'll achieve anything. There are also a fair few preparations you'll have to make first too.
textByHashes.20fe9b0132092008227edb7750bebd2329845f00: You are going to need to do a few things. You'll need a waking sleep potion, a Lunar staff, and ceremonial traveling clothes. Start with the potion, I suggest you have a word with Baba Yaga in her chicken house,
textByHashes.445490c8c528e9a736d075c6576fa9b65917473f: she will be able to help you with the making of the potion.
textByHashes.fc8d36b3d5ce4672adc06f8059e88b2f8e16769a: Yes, you can't miss it, it's walking around the north of the town.
textByHashes.4cd8325b0e57838414a4cbbce9e6d4a54cb6937a: Seek Baba Yaga, she is in her chicken house to the north of our island. She should be able to help you out with the potion of waking sleep.
textByHashes.958c77bb1eb7482067977e3e4783d04a547b0a96: Have you got the potion to give me?
textByHashes.cd950279f8d1b6d916b0fa33a210ead31110f5e5: Baba Yaga should be able to help you out with that.
textByHashes.8d21fc2368284d7b08bfc3f1753055af8c2e314e: Well done, I'll take that for safe keeping.
textByHashes.a12c63d3fa20acb154f1cbc8824d2014b39f3479: Next we will sort you out with the staff before the clothes. You are going to have to get hold of a Dramen staff first. You will need to take it to the air, fire, water and earth altars to imbue it with power to convert it
textByHashes.ef7a168ec74bd90b88e92ed026f6ddac08d7ceb7: into a Lunar staff. Bring that back to me and then we can get on with the next stage.
textByHashes.dac849b81c4997273e9a2086a3fe12aa168a9ee1: And don't worry, you'll be able to do anything you can with the new enchanted version of the Dramen Staff as you could with its ordinary form! Including visiting the lost city!
textByHashes.64e3fc92d9dbec3561203e98e26d5adad02264e1: Managed to get the Dramen staff enchanted?
textByHashes.edc7cbcd346c6aef7df07538234406815216d066: You are going to have to get hold of a Dramen staff first, which you should be able to get from Entrana. Take it to the air, fire, water and earth altars, in that order, to embue it with power to convert it into a
textByHashes.21f407fec7ab8b5d0bd226960c256320f278752b: Lunar staff. Bring that back to me and then we can get on with the next stage.
textByHashes.a1f5a8d798be3677504aee02864b7b1205fc2902: And don't worry, you'll be able to do anything you can with the new enchanted version of the Dramen Staff as you could with it's ordinary form! Including visiting the lost city!
textByHashes.41a744a923a3f8385b492b1524c92870ffdb5616: Now we can get on with the next stage - your suit! There are 8 parts to this.
textByHashes.e797117d617c660ad3b3d9d89c5a71ecbcabce1a: Which would you like to hear about?
textByHashes.32f318c61239220637dca5ad0bf85e4b4bf79dd6: This helm needs to be made from an ore you can only get from the mine on this island. You'll see some stalagmites that you can mine from.
textByHashes.4aaf52a5bbdf0992f38239a04c4e1b0474ff9fbd: There should be one of these floating around somewhere. Talk to some of the people in the village and I am sure one of them will be able to help you.
textByHashes.babf5b52784d22147bb2e15efb1bf58696ba1755: You should go and speak with Meteora, she always seems to be wearing one on her head for some reason. She might give that to you.
textByHashes.b11197e86ad46f9afcf180dc748fcf680da746ca: You'll find a monster called the Suqah that is indigenous to this island. You'll need one of their hides to make your torso, which you can tan only in this town.
textByHashes.754a01506e9395183c2e7bbc683346b2165c6ddc: You'll find a monster called the Suqah that is indigenous to this island. You'll need one of their hides to make your gloves, which you can tan only in this town
textByHashes.a13f78aa668f639496739200122172d4f352d587: You'll find a monster called the Suqah that is indigenous to this island. You'll need one of their hides to make your boots, which you can tan only in this town
textByHashes.576d90757d0bbc94f7c3c2cd8721719fbe1f8bba: You'll find a monster called the Suqah that is indigenous to this island. You'll need one of their hides to make your trousers, which you can tan only in this town
textByHashes.9ecc18b219e0310bfe01d170674be0aa958d7982: You should probably go and speak to Selene, she will be able to help you as she always seems to have bits and pieces like that hanging around.
textByHashes.66abf2490e081608fda197c42703cc65caf24001: Well you need to be making your Lunar clothes.
textByHashes.e5438c3e02f1513f212d495815a966411e844f24: Well that's no good to me, best you go and get it.
textByHashes.b1250fa7be616a63b588b4299d6dbf09abc1c88f: Why would you want to know that? You've already given me the Lunar helm to look after.
textByHashes.5f74e3d00b141013d9f875afa3934cdf4e236497: Why would you want to know that? you've already given me the Lunar cape to look after.
textByHashes.a78ffc932ed21238f63bee5e0c7be8c7c54ad60e: Why would you want to know that? you've already given me the Lunar amulet to look after.
textByHashes.57e74830d3e517d017cc2f47d3c56e56647e8740: Why would you want to know that? you've already given me the Lunar torso to look after.
textByHashes.09dd171518e548e76e230c272eafb99ec666f1e5: Why would you want to know that? you've already given me the Lunar gloves to look after.
textByHashes.1b0b7c95c0b4be8ff6fb6880fe6e7a0354e5471c: Why would you want to know that? you've already given me the Lunar boots to look after.
textByHashes.e35bc52a75cd7e4d4c46b7cbc140295941a44b04: Why would you want to know that? you've already given me the Lunar trousers to look after.
textByHashes.80f4df653ace2cabfd9104b503f39232968abc36: Ah you have everything! Good work!
textByHashes.2fbc3023218412c93eec2953fdbb6053f2c3bbb4: I can give you back all the items you need now. Ah... you don't have enough space to carry them. There are eleven items in total, perhaps you should come back when you have space?
textByHashes.50c24234d3e6317c4ece390a1996d2d84480eb8a: You're forgetting I can read you mind. I simply looked to see what you knew you were carrying, and analysed the average amount a person can carry and extrapolated...
textByHashes.1e2013336485ab95e7a59839fafbef2fd1ee7fb9: Now, I'm going to give you some magic kindling from the first magic tree that ever grew. I shall also give you back your ceremonial clothes which I want you to put on, take hold of the Lunar staff, pour your potion on
textByHashes.062cb5e755a7e5908e9de0c450f3539a696c3380: this kindling and burn it on the giant brazier in the centre of town. If you've done all this correctly, you'll be transported to the land of dreams. I can't help you from there on, that all depends upon your
textByHashes.94304ab5e585afcf15c3e2624a0ae9dc49ba139c: understanding of your self. Good luck!
textByHashes.33c566b5fe094a460419fc840274246637460857: You not been to dreamland yet?
textByHashes.2d97c0bfc166a318754aa28801b29139138c9111: Take your kindling and put on your ceremonial clothes, take hold of the Lunar staff, pour your potion on this kindling and use it on the giant brazier in the centre of town. If you've done all this correctly, you'll be
textByHashes.6da3a927696fb09e2d9137fa1e3e8e2fdb983379: transported to the land of dreams. I can't help you from there on, that all depends upon your understanding of your self. Good luck!
textByHashes.aa0a424a8fdf521429a091b7077684a4236b0758: I knew you'd do that, and I used my magic to teleport it back to me.
textByHashes.ed3ea653e5a0697227f2aa698f5c581bf847f991: Look, do you want it or not?
textByHashes.a9b3a50b62d80fb7e03345a648c25a0753f99703: Sure, I don't seem to be able to get rid of them!
textByHashes.0c34a1c5824c2d33aa485ead8fb56f5e27aad4bd: Good job I have a spare one then isn't it!
textByHashes.9a567dde904eb88068b07cd041cae4e82e1cc7bd: I already knew that. I got one especially.
textByHashes.7e8b727336be299da18d303176fbc49a9c64780d: Well of course, I know that already, so I got a backup for you.
textByHashes.888e9fb0637505db78b162825cd8c737f14469e4: Oh dear, good job I pre-empted you!
textByHashes.e5151dd43305d51ca53d96f1d7e95fb5bfd9a420: I know. Good job I knew you would drop it!
textByHashes.11dd441dc1d5f31b5b60ca7b7f22aa2352d68eda: Very good, but you haven't learnt anything yet?
textByHashes.fbc5b818b2582a1656f10200be3aebe7b75b1918: Well best you return and do that before you tell me what you have learned. I'd rather you learn all you can before you talk to me about it.
textByHashes.9876180fd4432456b7cb0e35f0484b0a85dec1d5: You do, I'm not sure I believe you. Tell me what you've learnt.
textByHashes.d0aed38fd84c2a3087c6ee15786cebedc0f1cf58: That's great! I would never have imagined someone from mainland could have had such an open mind to learn such things! I shall spread the word among our people. After this I can't see why we can't start to get
textByHashes.5487fc9e11d1a73d5338f887507acb3a65e8ae0f: Well done! You must be rewarded for this great deed. You're now more than welcome to use the altar behind me to craft the astral runes that we use here on the island. These runes will allow you to use a new set of
textByHashes.b6d483f3d2b4ee8c863418af8ebb111870c961b4: spells. Simply pray at the altar behind me to gain the knowledge.
textByHashes.b2408a5ad1997b8c3d2292049f5bc85ee6532f49: Well hopefully a lot better now that you've initiated the calm between the Moon Clan and the Fremenniks. Remember, if you want to use our Lunar Spells at any time, pray at the altar beside me and you can modify
textByHashes.b28cdce827f1ebd555e291a0e154adaabcceb74a: Hello there. I hear that Cyrisus is no longer with us.
textByHashes.f203aa0af83528761d9447808e974e7ebfc9ffb8: I suppose the good do die young.
textByHashes.c1f0a199bc5d6eaa0dd78611d1ef04e74a286e53: But it's going to cost you! It will be 30000 coins!
textByHashes.0e3e69a442357944f5ad2d91571eca415d0119b1: Sorry dear, you don't have enough coins for that.
textByHashes.33dda2cebcfdd73eb08d1e8153381aac37987c13: But it's going to cost you! It will be coins!
textByHashes.e0938bb2972e1a2cd38092c6487e9826c2ef84de: As you mention it, yes. He wanted to create more astral runes.
textByHashes.204d953d01c718a20febb0fcdaea4dc12cb49d59: He said something about fighting kalphites, whatever they are.
